headline: Northside Kings: Preseason Front Office Brief
executive_summary: Northside Kings carries a championship-lineup C-AVI average of 61.44, led by Bhayshul Tuten, Mike Evans, and RJ Harvey. The clearest lineup pressure point is the QB slot held by Jordan Love at 52.4 C-AVI.

sections.title: Competitive Core
sections.body: The three highest C-AVI starters are Bhayshul Tuten (72.9), Mike Evans (70.8), and RJ Harvey (62.3).

sections.title: Lineup Pressure Point
sections.body: Jordan Love is the lowest C-AVI starter in the verified championship lineup at 52.4. Any acquisition should clear that lineup threshold.

sections.title: Depth and Flexibility
sections.body: The team file contains 15 offensive players, with 7 outside the modeled starting eight. The offensive roster D-AVI average is 63.52.

sections.title: Availability
sections.body: All 15 offensive players in the current team file are marked Active.
